entry.title: L.I.S ensure that events ( documents deliveries ) are all captured
entry.content:
hello Community 

we are in a situation where we capture deliveries documents in a LIS , then a scheduled report will pick data from this LIS to send to vendors , sometimes when the report ran it generate no data at all or missing data , we are suspecting that the huge amount of deliveries needs time to update the Info structure table .  could you please assist how we can make sure that the update is complete ( we are in asynchronous mode ) , is there a way to monitor the update of these LIS table ? 

Best regards . thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: The error in reversing entry of Asset Accounting
entry.content:
If you limited to 2L, then can you check if the same document number is used in both ledgers.
If so then reversing on one ledger won't be possible. 

You can consider scrapping the 2L part.

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI VBScript scripting not running / Not recordin...
entry.content:
Hi, 

I have the same problem. What was the solution for your problem?

best regards

Yvonne

entry.title: Re: CMC and Authorized URL / Custom Elements
entry.content:
just backup the "WebIntelgence" Application.
All settings for the "WebIntelgence" Application, including authorized URL and custom elements, are saved with.

Note:
By importing the lcmbiar, All settings for the “WebIntelligence” application are imported. (You cannot select individual Settings)

entry.title: CDS consuming other CDS with virtualElement field has this field empty
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a CDS view that selects the data directly from the database table (let's call it CDS-1). CDS-1 contains a virtualElement field which is populated by an ABAP class. When CDS-1 is queried using OData, the virtualElement field correctly displays the values assigned by the ABAP code.

However, I have the second CDS (let's call it CDS-2) which selects the data from the CDS-1. When I query CDS-2 using OData, the virtualElement field from CDS-1 is displayed in the result, but it is completely empty - the methods of the ABAP class are not called at all because the break-point doesn't stop there. CDS-2 is an analytical CDS, so I cannot move the virtualElement field there, because I would get the following error: Transformation @OBJECTMODEL.VIRTUALELEMENTCALCULATEDBY on element X is not allowed in analytical views

The CDS-2 must be an analytical view, as it is supposed to be used in a KPI that requires Aggregation Annotations as described in SAP KBA 2595272.

Is there any solution to populate this field in the CDS-2 as well? Or should I use a different approach?

entry.title: Re: 固定资产-变更（异步）错误HTTP Code: 403 ( Forbidden )
entry.content: 创建就不是了，我这是变更的，建议查看下官方Help文档

entry.title: Re: 固定资产-变更（异步）错误HTTP Code: 403 ( Forbidden )
entry.content: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/5bcca49998834de2b5533c36602e52a2/594cb5c3a8b34db1a6105b4b23cdf4ce.html?locale=en-US&q=HTTP%20Code%3A%20403%20%28%20Forbidden%20%29

entry.title: Re: Change of existing batch number
entry.content:
Hello @ssaher412 

You can't just change batch number. The number is part of the batch key. Hence if you change a batch number, you are going in fact create a new batch.

Having said that, what you need to do is to create a new batch without the special character and post stock transfer from the old batch with special character to the new one.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Elements app is not returning data after in...
entry.content:
Thank you for posting your question.

I request you to share additional details about the network call and the failure response, along with the error logs. Looking at those information I might be able to assist you to further.

entry.title: Re: BAPI for partial goods receipt using inbound delivery with Handling Unit

Dear,

i have same requirement, please do you remember how did you solve it? Could you share anything?

entry.title: Re: CONVT_NO_NUMBER when looping over internal table
entry.content:
@ArthurParisius

You need to share some more details e.g definition of gt_struct, especially what is the type of objid, the type of p_toporg. Otherwise is all but impossible to get the cause of the conversion error.

entry.title: Re: Exploring Integration Options available in SAP Master Data Governance on S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi @ErikP ,

If you use SAP RM as RM protocol in SOAMANAGER web service configuration, the message transaction will be considered as asynchronous and SOAP response is not needed.

Kind regards, Vijay

entry.title: Re: DMS Images in SmartForms
entry.content: did u get any Solution?

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK Form Cell Header reference
entry.content:
MDK currently doesn't support accessing section header (and items) via ClientAPI. We'll enhance this in future releases. 

You can have a workaround of settings a rule on the Enable property and redraw the section.

Below is an example how I tried:

  • Added a switch control (see attached screenshot) on the page to trigger a redraw the Allocation1FormCell section when changing the switch control value. 

    let pageProxy = context.getPageProxy();
    pageProxy.getControl('SectionedTable0').getSection('Allocation1FormCell').redraw();
  • Bound the Enabled property of Save button to a rule

    let pageProxy = context.getPageProxy();
    let sectionTable = pageProxy.getControl('SectionedTable0');
    if(sectionTable!=null) {
    let switchVal = sectionTable.getSection('Allocation1FormCell').getControl('FormCellSwitch0').getValue();
    return switchVal;
    }
    else {
    return false;
    }
    • You have to accordingly implement such logic in your app based on your requirements.

entry.title: Re: Print images stored in DMS into SMARTFORMS
entry.content:
Dear V. Kumar,
If you get solution, could u please brief it.

entry.title: Re: Invoice is generated with negative net value SAP SD
entry.content:
The information what you shared is not sufficient to understand the issue and assist you.  A screen shot from sale order and billing could have helped to assist you.  Couple of queries from my side

  • When you say, after clicking update button, the negative value goes in billing, how about in sale order ? 
  • Is the value in sale order correct ?  How pr00 flows to sale order and billing ?
  • Is there a valid condition record taken care during sale order creation and billing ?
  • Did you check the change log of condition record and sale order ?

For me, it seems to be due to custom validation not working properly which you can find out via debugging.

entry.title: Re: What's the support end date for SAP Business Objects...
entry.content:
BI 4.2 will reach end of priority one support at the end of 2024.

have a look at this blog

entry.title: Re: Failed to commit objects to server : Undefined Info S...
entry.content: Check the Rights for the user you use to create and update users.

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Winshuttle script execution - Error: Field is not an input field
entry.content:
I want to record a script in VA01 in Winshuttle Studio. Therefore I need to adjust the item conditions. For this I have to manually overwrite the automatically stored price with the Price Condition PR10. During the recording there are no problems but as soon as I want to execute the script I get the error message:

Field (KOMV-KWERT Condition value) (6) SAPMV45A 5003 is not an input field

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4 HANA TM - Report Event in Freight Order
entry.content: Dear Naga Chaitanya,

entry.title: The Heterogeneous, Composable, Autonomous Enterprise
entry.content:
In "The Heterogeneous, Composable, Autonomous Enterprise" talk at the Next Generation SAP Enterprise Architect Forum 2024, Damien Johnson explores the transformational journey of enterprise technology from monolithic systems to the dawn of a new era characterized by heterogeneity, composability, and autonomy. Johnson provides insights into the evolving business landscape, where leveraging a mix of technologies and fostering flexible, adaptable operations are crucial for success. He emphasizes the significance of embracing change, integrating diverse systems, and moving towards more autonomous business processes. Through this lens, Johnson offers a forward-looking perspective on how enterprises can navigate the complexities of today's digital world, advocating for sustainability, resilience, and the strategic use of SAP and other technologies to craft dynamic, future-ready organizations.

The talk “The Heterogeneous, Composable, Autonomous Enterprise” by Damien Johnson weaves through several significant themes that are pivotal to understanding the future direction of enterprise technology and business operations.

Here are the main themes distilled from the speech:

The Evolution of Enterprise Technology: The speech traces the journey of enterprise technology from mainframes to the cloud era, emphasizing the rapid pace of change and the shift towards more efficient, interconnected, and autonomous systems.

Heterogeneous IT Landscapes: Acknowledging the complexity of modern IT landscapes, the talk underlines that successful enterprises now operate in environments that are not solely dependent on SAP or any single vendor but are a mix of various technologies and solutions. This heterogeneity is not just a challenge but a reality that businesses must embrace to stay competitive.

Composability in Enterprise Operations: The concept of composable enterprise is highlighted as crucial for businesses to adapt and thrive in a fast-changing world. This approach allows organizations to reconfigure and adapt their operations and processes with agility, leveraging modular, interchangeable components.

Autonomy and Automation: Johnson discusses the shift towards autonomous operations, where businesses increasingly rely on algorithms, AI, and machine learning to make decisions and execute processes. This move towards automation is not just about efficiency but about enabling higher-level decision-making and operations that can operate with minimal human intervention.

Cloud and Cloud ERP as Enablers: The role of cloud technology, particularly Cloud ERP, is emphasized as a key enabler for achieving heterogeneity, composability, and autonomy in enterprises. SAP's efforts to adapt and lead in this space, with initiatives like Cloud ERP and integration capabilities, are positioned as vital for supporting businesses in this new era.

Sustainability and Resilience: Sustainability and the ability to build resilient operations are identified as critical outcomes that modern enterprises should aim for. The talk touches on how technological evolution supports these goals, enabling businesses to be more agile, efficient, and responsible in their operations.

Adapting to Change: A recurring theme throughout the talk is the necessity for businesses and technology architectures to be adaptable to change. Johnson emphasizes the importance of being able to quickly respond to new challenges and opportunities, leveraging the heterogeneous, composable, and autonomous capabilities of modern enterprise systems.

These themes collectively point towards a future where flexibility, adaptability, and the intelligent use of technology define the successful enterprise. Johnson's talk offers insights into how SAP and its ecosystem can support organizations in navigating this complex, evolving landscape.

Remember:

"The era of monolithic systems is fading. Today, the spotlight is on heterogeneous, composable, and autonomous enterprises that thrive on adaptability, resilience, and innovation." - Damien Johnson

Access Presentation: Here         

Watch the YouTube Video of Damien's Presentation: Here  

CTA
For Enterprise Architect SAP Community Updates and More: Connect with and Follow Paul Kurchina - https://www.linkedin.com/in/paulkurchina/ 

Flag Photo with Damien

entry.title: Re: CONVT_NO_NUMBER when looping over internal table
entry.content: Have you checked that it's this field that's causing the error?

entry.title: My i18n folder is not opening, it continuosly loading.
entry.content: My i18n folder is not opening, it continuosly loading.

entry.title: SAP Mobile Start leverages Google Chrome's latest Picture-in-Picture (PiP) Mode
entry.content:
By Aditya Arora (SAP Development Expert)

We're thrilled to share some exciting news that will enhance your SAP Mobile Start experience on Android! Google Chrome has just unveiled its newest feature, Picture-in-Picture (PiP ) mode, and it's generating quite some excitement among Android users. This development opens a world of possibilities, offering greater flexibility and multitasking capabilities from your Chrome browser.

Here's a quick breakdown of what this means for all of you, using SAP Mobile Start:

Enhanced Multitasking: Gone are the days of being confined to a single tab! With PiP mode, you can seamlessly switch between different web apps without losing your place. Whether you're checking various KPIs or handling different tasks within SAP Mobile Start, multitasking just got a whole lot easier.

Streamlined User Interface: The UI has received a facelift with the addition of a handy minimize button in the top left corner. A simple tap on this button transforms your web page into a floating PiP window, giving you the freedom to move it around your screen as you please.

Enhanced Control and Convenience: Take control of your browsing experience like never before. With the ability to easily close or reopen the PiP window, you have the power to customize your workflow according to your preferences. Enjoy a smoother, more personalized experience tailored to your needs.

As of today, this feature is available on select Android phones running Chrome 122 or above. While it may not be universally available just yet, you can enable it by toggling the Picture-in-Picture option within Chrome settings.

 

Chrome settings                             

 

To give you a firsthand look at how this feature can elevate your SAP Mobile Start experience, I've shared below screenshots showcasing its functionality with Chrome's Custom Chrome Tabs (CCT) integration. Watch as the PiP mode seamlessly integrates with SAP Mobile Start, featuring the app icon, page name, and domain.

 

SAP Mobile Start – Picture-in-Picture in action

 

We hope that providing this new feature enhances your mobile experience on Android!

For further information on the new topics, please check our SAP Mobile Start documentation.

Visit SAP Mobile Experience Community Page and click “follow” to get the latest development and innovation of our solutions. We look forward to hearing about your experience with setting up the solution in your landscape; please do share your thoughts and comments below. Enter here for additional questions regarding SAP Mobile Experience Applications.

Want to be notified? Check your profile settings to ensure you have your settings activated.

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5: View doesn't load corresponding Controller after routing in ToolPage Layout
entry.content: Is there any relevant error in the console when navigating to the list (2nd screenshot)? Could you double-check if all controllerName="..." are correct in the views?

entry.title: Launching an application built with SAP Mobile Services directly through SAP Mobile Start
entry.content:
Hi all,

I created an application using SAP Mobile Services (and hence, a MDK project in SAP Business Application Studio), deployed it, and linked it to SAP Mobile Start through SAP Build Work Zone. However, when I try launching the app from SAP Mobile Start (which is this application:

)

I get redirected to the SAP Mobile Services Client application (this one:

),

which needs to be installed and correctly configured on my mobile phone, including the scanning of the Mobile Services application's QR Code:

This is very unconvenient since, in case I had two different Mobile Services application linked to SAP Mobile Start, that would perhaps mean that I'd need to scan a different QR Code every time I'd try accessing one app or the other. And even with one application, if I need to authenticate myself on two different SAP services for accessing a single app, this results in a very bad user experience.

Is there a way to launch a Mobile Services application directly inside SAP Mobile Start, and bypass the authentication on SAP Mobile Services Client?

Thanks in advance

Edoardo

entry.title: To restrict Project owner from editing task name in sourcing project Ariba
entry.content:
Looking for a solution to restrict project owner from editing task names or task details in full process templates.

Additionally looking for a solution for auto completion of task on change of status from Open to pending selection of a Event template.

If any one can support please let me know can update you in detail for this query.

SAP Ariba Sourcing SAP Ariba Strategic Sourcing Suite

entry.title: Invalid RMS ID
entry.content:
Hi All, 

We have an issue with one user set up. 

Dispute case was created and sent for approval, when approver goes to DRA Worklist he gets error 'Invalid RMS ID' and is unable to locate any dispute case assigned to him for approval. 

We have no clue what is the reason here and IT is no help... 

Any hint highly appreciated 😊

Thanks for this, i have been trying to work with SAPDIAPI and its so deprecated to work with anything  .NET 6 and above

entry.title: Re: Sales in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition – Automated Order Process with SAP´s Intelligent Tech
entry.content: Where is AI used?

entry.title: Re: Service Layer - Delete or edit valid value - UserFiel...
entry.content:
Hi Stef5,

Kindly refer to the following blog post: SAP Business One Service Layer: Entity CRUD - Update

The blog discusses about the header B1S-ReplaceCollectionsOnPatch=true which you need to use for your scenario.

Header B1S-ReplaceCollectionsOnPatch=true sets the update method as REPLACE, which means the whole content will be replaced and the mismatched old rows will be deleted.

In case of any issue, please do not hesitate to write us back.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Cloud ERP - Opportunities, Challenges & SAP's Outreach
entry.content:
The Case for Cloud - Updates

'The Case for Cloud' initiative is all about SAP's measures to differentiate between cloud and on-premise offerings. To make the move to 'RISE with SAP' more compelling to your customers, various resources for Partners have been introduced. Kindly review them.

  • Field One-Pagers: The Case for Cloud
  • News on - SAP Migration and Modernization
  • SAP Cloud Solutions and Services
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Product Expert Training - (April 22nd – April 30th) 2024

entry.title: BTP service deletion stuck
entry.content:
Hi BTP Experts,

we currently have a running deletion process for the job-scheduler, which now runs for ~20 hours.

Is there anything I can do to restart/cancel this process? It seems to be stuck...

Thanks!
Nico

entry.title: Re: BUPA_DIALOG_JOEL126 Area credit segment data contains...
entry.content:
Hi Matthias,

 

Please check the partner determination settings. If they are missing, kindly configure them.

Regards
Faraz Rahim

entry.title: Re: SSAM Android Client build fails (SSAM 2310 + MDK 23.8.7)
entry.content:
You might not be using the 2310 branding sdk. Inside the Branding SDK, there is a folder SAM.mdkproject/App_Resources_Merge/Android/app.gradle. Check if that app.gradle contains 

defaultConfig {
    minSdkVersion 30
    targetSdkVersion 33
}

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!
entry.content: Thanks a lot for the praise and warm welcome @Katherne_K,  I am very pleased to meet you. Looking forward to the community, knowledge sharing and networking.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to manage bindings and users in the Sy...
entry.content:
Hi Stef5,

I personally do not think that it is possible.

This appears to be an internal API.

Also, the last information which I had was that after OIDC release, the component will be using OIDC unified API to logon. LogonBySystemUser will no longer be in use.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Thank you so much for the praise and support @StephanieMarley . I've already become part of the interest group community and I'm excited about the opportunity to collaborate, share ideas, and learn together.

entry.title: Re: Error executing action: Could not fetch client credentials token for service of type "desti
entry.content: is this issue resolved ? i am also facing same issue

entry.title: What is the VAT Return posting consolidation logic?
entry.content:
Good morning, all!

I am trying to do some VAT reconciliation between the VAT included in our VAT returns and the VAT recorded in the various G/L accounts, but I cannot work out how the amounts are consolidated into the VAT return.

There are some more obvious split by segment, profit centre and tax event type (Domestic sales of goods, Domestic purchase of services, etc), but I still have hundreds of lines that I can't work out. I have tried by Document Type (Supplier Invoice, Expenses), Tax due dates, posting dates but nothing else seems to work

Has anyone come across and worked out what logic is applied here?

Thank you!

Adeline

entry.title: Re: Error executing action: Could not fetch client creden...
entry.content: during action execution: Could not fetch client credentials token for service of type "destination"

entry.title: Carry forward of PO to next FY without releasing of budget
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are using FM-BCS budgeting procedure, as per our business requirement we have to carry forward all open PO's to next financial year at the end of current FY.

Please suggest what procedure we have to follow to carry forward PO without releasing of budget in next FY.

Thanks in advance.

Chandan

entry.title: Re: AI in SAP Ariba Invoicing - Intelligent Invoice Conversion
entry.content:
Hello @Christine_K,

Apologies for the delay. Kindly check if below link helps you.

  • Setting Up a Connection to SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management

If not, request you to make use of SAP Community's Partner Delivery Group to post your query. Here, Partner Consultants and SAP SMEs take part to answer the queries.

entry.title: CDS view for generated table of Pricing Condition
entry.content:
Hi,

We created new condition type and this generated new table A900. We want to use it in our customization but we cannot find it's corresponding CDS view. Is there a released API as well on this? Thank you

 

Best Regards,

Emman

entry.title: 📅 Einladung zum SAP Datasphere Day
entry.content:
SAP Datasphere – und sein offenes Datenökosystem – bildet die Grundlage für das Business Data Fabric. Es ermöglicht Unternehmen, allen Nutzern aussagekräftige Daten bereitzustellen, einschließlich des passenden Geschäftskontextes und der entsprechenden Logik.

Erfahren Sie beim SAP Datasphere Day, wie Sie das Potenzial Ihrer Unternehmensdaten nutzen.

Sie erhalten innerhalb eines Tages einen Überblick über SAP Datasphere mit praktischen Übungen. Der Schwerpunkt liegt auf den grundlegenden Funktionen von SAP Datasphere – dem Extrahieren, Laden und Umwandeln verschiedener Daten und der Integration von Daten aus verschiedenen Quellen in ein lebendiges und intelligentes Unternehmenssystem.

Freuen Sie sich auf eine ideale Mischung aus theoretischen Inhalten und praktischer Anwendung:

Expertenvorträge:

  • Storytelling: SAP Datasphere – Die nächste Generation von Data Services, Datenfunktionen und Datentransformation für SAP-Cloud-Systeme
  • Storytelling: Semantic Definitions and Associations for Business Logics. Daten für Self-Service in SAP Analytics Cloud präsentieren


Schulungsinhalte:

  • Überblick und Grundlagen von SAP Datasphere
  • Datenimport- und Datenreplikationsoptionen
  • Einfache Datenmodellierung in SAP Datasphere
  • Verwendung von Datasphere-Modellen in SAP Analytics Cloud


Hands-On Übungen:

  •  Von Rohdaten zu SAP-Analytics-Cloud-Reporting


Testing SAP Datasphere:

  • Datennutzung für SAP Analytics Cloud mithilfe von erfahrenen Trainern

 

Jetzt anmelden

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Process Automation action error 'unsupported'
entry.content:
After raising a ticket with SAP, we learned that ClientCertificateAuth destinations are not supported.

The documentation has been updated with this info.

entry.title: How to change XKOMV-KHERK type from 'E' to another?
entry.content:
How to change XKOMV-KHERK type from 'E' to another?

I'm trying to change an Amount field at 

VL03N->HeaderInformation->Conditions.

I've got a condition type (ZF00 ) which calculates 2.5 % of delivery cost and add it to sum, but user didn't see the percentage at amount field.(img1)

And can't see only after doubliclicking (img2).
As i understand it deppends on XKOMV-KHERK field.

I found it in code :

Spoiler
if xkomv-kherk = 'E'.
  rv61a-zeile_leer = 'Y'.
endif.

And if the rv61a-zeile_leer is equals to 'X' 'Y' or 'Z' the programm doesn't allow to change screen.
How to change XKOMV-KHERK and save the calculation 2.5% of cost ?

entry.title: How to change XKOMV-KHERK type from 'E' to another?
entry.content:
How to change XKOMV-KHERK type from 'E' to another?

I'm trying to change an Amount field at 

VL03N->HeaderInformation->Conditions.

I've got a condition type (ZF00 ) which calculates 2.5 % of delivery cost and add it to sum, but user didn't see the percentage at amount field.(img1)

And can't see only after doubliclicking (img2).
As i understand it deppends on XKOMV-KHERK field.

I found it in code :

Spoiler
if xkomv-kherk = 'E'.
  rv61a-zeile_leer = 'Y'.
endif.

And if the rv61a-zeile_leer is equals to 'X' 'Y' or 'Z' the programm doesn't allow to change screen.
How to change XKOMV-KHERK and save the calculation 2.5% of cost ?

entry.title: Re: ABAP-Types with class
entry.content:
@shais Ok, I was a bit unprecise there, let me rephrase it 😊

Back in my post from 04-28-2023 4:17 PM, I described the problem I'm coming from. I used the approach that is demonstrated in this blog post. But getting the domain of a variable that is defined in such way doesn't work, even if the underlying type is in fact a DDIC type.

I've prepared a code example, trying to get the domain from either help_id or get_ddic_field( 😞

Spoiler
class ycl_0000ca_rtts definition
  public final
  create public.

  public section.
    " The data element keyflag has a same-named domain with two fixed values
    types test_type1 type keyflag.
    " LVC_VALUE is based on domain text128
    types test_type2 type lvc_value.

    class-data test_variable1 type ycl_0000ca_rtts=>test_type1.
    class-data test_variable2 type ycl_0000ca_rtts=>test_type2.

    interfaces if_oo_adt_classrun.
endclass.

class ycl_0000ca_rtts implementation.
  method if_oo_adt_classrun~main.
    data elemdescr type ref to cl_abap_elemdescr.

    " Test help_id for type 1:
    elemdescr ?= cl_abap_datadescr=>describe_by_data( test_variable1 ).
    out->write( |Help ID: { elemdescr->help_id } (should be keyflag)| ).
    " OK - this works because data element and domain have incidentally the same name

    " Test help_id for type 2:
    elemdescr ?= cl_abap_datadescr=>describe_by_data( test_variable2 ).
    out->write( |Help ID: { elemdescr->help_id } (should be text128)| ).

    " The following raises exception no_ddic_type
*    data(domain_name) = elemdescr->get_ddic_field( )-domname.
  endmethod.
endclass.

So whatever help_id is, it's not the domain.

And get_ddic_field( ) doesn't work, although deep down, the variable is really based on DDIC.

Probably the information gets lost, because that's how the actual types look in the debugger:

entry.title: Re: Back to basics with SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) - part 10
entry.content: Thanks Ajay! You're right! I'll make sure I add the link to the corresponding entry here in the future live streams so they're all immediately accessible, like here for the next one.

entry.title: Deleting of composition data after successful data upload from Intelligence authoring system
entry.content: We are sending material composition data into CG02 specification level from Intelligence authoring system which is externel system. After successful job runs, data has been adding and but after one day again composition data has been deleting from specification level. we have uploaded three times and try to check that again after some time composition data has been deleting from specification which is causing  error like no composition present  while creating Purchase orders. Please help me in this

entry.title: Multiple SAP Instance and Non-SAP Data | SAP ICMR
entry.content:
Hi, 

How can we configure ICMR in a way which involves fetching data from multiple SAP instances(for ACDOCA) as well as Non-SAP systems for Intercompany matching and reconciliation?

entry.title: Re: Introduction of Bad Debt Relief solution
entry.content:
Hi Jiri, 

I would like to ask you if such report/process is also available for pure FI module. Our customer is looking for automatic solution  but on the vendor side. They already know that  payables will not be paid in time and they are obliged to  create correction documents. 

thank you

Tomas

entry.title: My blogs show my userid instead of my name
entry.content:
My blog # https://blogs.sap.com/2023/06/03/outbound-process-from-dc-site-to-multiple-customers-in-s-4-hana-embedded-ewm-tm-asr-integration-in-ltl-shippers-scenario/ shows my userid instead of my name.

Please help.

Thanks

Prashant

entry.title: Material Sales text to Invoice
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Scenario- Business wants to fetch Material sales text from sales document for every material present in the invoice created for S4 HANA cloud.

Please suggest how to proceed?

Thanks and Regards,

PRI

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere is ready to take over the role of SAP BW
entry.content:
As an end user who switched from a third party BI-solution to datasphere / SAC, it is good to see that planning is being addressed. I have been waiting for that. 

Datasphere is powerful and we use its functionality heavily, which is great. I cannot speak about the comparison to BW but I do expect in the future that *all* SAC functionality works with Datasphere models (or Datasphere as the source) and truly becomes a first class citizen in SAC.

Blending models and creating datasets for example.

entry.title: Re: How to add a new field to Business Volume Selection Criteria?
entry.content:
Hi @tugcezorlu , wonderful blog and well explained. May I ask you a subsequent question. I also did a similar setup for one of my customers where I could successfuly add a custom field in the business volume. We were able to create condition contract using the new field in the business volume tab, however when we run the transaction WB2R_BUSVOL to see the business volume, system gives a dump as it is not able to find the new added field. Is there any other setting that needs to be done to see the business volume based on the new field.

 

Thanks

Arpit

entry.title: Re: Invoicing in SAP Ariba
entry.content:
SAP Central Invoice Management is now referred as SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management.

Refer this FAQ for the typical questions on the topic.

entry.title: What functions have been improved in SAP S/4HANA Sourcing and Procurement?
entry.content:
We  recommend to access our Exploring Functions and Innovation in SAP S/4HANA Sourcing and Procurement learning journey learning journey.

Overview
This learning journey is for business users or consultants experienced in SAP ERP Sourcing and Procurement that want to know what functions have been improved and what key innovations have been added in SAP S/4HANA Sourcing and Procurement. For both SAP S/4HANA and for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition.

Many functions are covered, like the changes to the data model in SAP S/4HANA, new options in Sourcing and Contract Management as well as the analytical features of SAP S/4HANA.

Learning objectives

  • Get introduced to SAP S/4HANA Sourcing and Procurement
  • Execute an operational procurement process in SAP S/4HANA
  • Work with Sourcing and Contract Management in SAP S/4HANA
  • Discuss the analytical capabilities of SAP S/4HANA Sourcing and Procurement
  • Learn what other Procurement-related functionality SAP S/4HANA offers

Prerequisites

  • Experience in SAP ERP Sourcing and Procurement

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you.

We appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

entry.title: Re: How can assign in Identity Authentication Service IAS...
entry.content:
Hi Thomas

I don't think a template is available to download. You can check the documentation for CSV file format if needed

https://help.sap.com/docs/identity-authentication/identity-authentication/import-user-groups-via-csv-file

Remember you can provision user to groups by other means. ie, via IPS you can read users/groups from a source system and provision to IAS target system.

entry.title: Re: XML to JSON convert streaming not working
entry.content:
You need to add xmlns:rfc=urn:sap-com:document:sap:rfc:functions to your Namespace Mapping in the Runtime Configuration, and declare the XML element rfc:Z_CUSTOMER_BALANCE.Response/ET_CUSTOMERS_BALANCE/item in your streaming configuration (notice the addition of the namespace prefix).  The converter cannot find your specified XML element because in effect it does not exist in your XML payload.

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: No ABAP environments in CF space found. Check the Application Wizard console output view for details
entry.content: When trying to use trail version, getting attached error

entry.title: Re: CIAP@TDF: Baixa de fichas
entry.content:
Olá pessoal.

Pelo que entendi na criação das fichas, fica pré-determinada a quantidade de parcelas (48) para crédito, sendo possível a interrupção pelas baixas e estornos que se aplicam.

O cliente em questão afirma ter base legal para finalizar um cenário de tomada de crédito em 48 parcelas, para total restante em única parcela, ou seja, na parcela seguinte.

Até o momento eu não achei posts ou documentação SAP a respeito deste cenário.

Do lado do TDF faz sentido essa afirmação?

Se sim, como seria possível fazer?

Obrigado.

entry.title: Re: Build Work Zone Single logout (SLO) for a multitenant...
entry.content:
Hi @FranciscoGarcia,

sorry for hijacking your question, but did I get you right that your SaaS Subscriber subaccount is using an IAS with OIDC protocol?

Also, for the consumer subaccount we have an IAS using OpenID Connect protocol, through which we can access the launchpad.

Is this IAS provided by a customer (so coming from a different global account) or are you providing the IAS for your customers who subscribe to your SaaS application (so it's created in the same global account, where your application is running)?
I had a discussion here, with the result that it's not possible to connect external IAS via OIDC, only via SAML protocol. That's why I'm wondering what your exact situation is.

Thanks for any feedback!
BR,
Nico

entry.title: Re: Invoice is generated with negative net value SAP SD

Thanks!

when i am trying to use that in Script as i want some number generated from that RFC. when i am tying to call the RFC i see options for input parameter but don't see my export parameter. and also in Script its giving me syntax error. Appreciate your help with issue

entry.title: Re: OKC9 Substitution for OBYC - DIF Transaction Key

entry.title: Re: Preparing for SAP Identity Management’s End-of-Maintenance in 2027
entry.content:
Hi @MichaelFr ,

is the solution described above already available? We are implementing S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and already use IAS and IPS. We don't want to set up a CUA anymore and would like to know, if we could already achieve a similar functionality. Managing users and authorizations manually on multiple S/4 systems with multiple clients is a pain...

BR,
Mark

entry.title: Re: XML to JSON convert streaming not working
entry.content: I am getting the error "Enter JSON prefix". What to put in the JSON PREFIX

entry.title: Asset transfer ABUMN - partial transfer of wrongly added acquisition value
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts

I have a question regarding the partial transfer of an asset using ABUMN.

In 2019 an asset was created (laptop).  Use life : 3 years.

In 2023 (asset is already fully depreciated – NBV = zero), a new asset was created for the replacement of this old asset.  But when posting the invoice, the old asset was used instead of the new one.  So the acquisition value on the old asset increased with the value of the new asset.  But because the initial asset was already fully depreciated, the new value did not depreciate.

Now I want to transfer the new value to the new created asset.  How can I do this (partial) transfer ?  I only want to transfer the new value to the new asset and keep the original value on the old asset.

When I try to do the partial transfer, using the new value, also a part of the accumulated deprecation will be transferred and that is not the purpose.  I only want to transfer the new acquisition value, which has not been depreciated yet.  Original acquisition value and accumulated depreciation (same amount because fully depreciated) should remain on the old asset.

Thank you for your input !  Much appreciated !

entry.title: Re: Special characters not displayed correctly in SAP BO 4.3
entry.content: Good afternoon, as you suggested, I added the NLS_LANG variable on the server, but the problem was not solved

entry.title: Re: SAP ADT installation issue
entry.content: Yes, I tried both JAVA IDEs but no luck.

entry.title: Re: OKC9 Substitution for OBYC - DIF Transaction Key
entry.content: Hi Ajay, Can you please share you reply once again

entry.title: Re: XML to JSON convert streaming not working
entry.content: @ekekakos not the Namespace Mapping in the converter, the Namespace Mapping in the Runtime Configuration of the integration flow.

entry.title: Re: SAP ADT installation issue
entry.content: Yes, I have used "*latest", version specific (online and offline) versions, but no luck.

entry.title: Re: The error in reversing entry of Asset Accounting
entry.content:
Hello,

you can reverse only the complete posting for all ledgers and not ledger dependent, and this only if the fiscal year in 0L (ended end of March) is opened in GL and AA.

As long as the alternative fiscal year is not open, you need to post an inverted posting for both ledgers.

Best,

SEvil

SAP Cloud ERP Product Management

entry.title: Customized profitability report using report painter in cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have requirement to create the profitability report in cloud, since standard Market segment actual is not serving the purpose, hence need to create the customized report using like report as below

1 Revenue

2 Sales deduction ( On invoice Discount)

3 Off Invoice Discount 

4 Gross profit = 1-2-3

5 Cogs 

6 Direct Overhead

7 Indirect Overhead

8 Net Profit  4-5-6-7

Can we achieve this any other way.

Regards,

Santhosha BH

entry.title: Unable to attach encrypted file to Billing Document
entry.content:
Hi All,

My user is trying to attach a password protected file to the billing document via Manage Billing Document and receives Error while uploading the attachment error. I have been told that password protected files are blocked for virus scanner and therefore password protected files are not allowed to be uploaded. My user was able to upload password protected file in past.

Any guidance how do we get around this?

Many thanks

Monali

entry.title: Re: Local Data Lost
entry.content: Same here. Does it have something to do with saving local data into session named folders? it would be helpful to have it the way it used to be. Also ... Will Appgyver forums content be available anywhere?

entry.title: Re: XML to JSON convert streaming not working
entry.content: Thank you very much for your valuable help.

entry.title: GanttCharts scrolling not working
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a problem with my two ganttcharts. I want to  the scrolling together.

But the vertical Scrollbar does not work correctly.

In my attachment you find a screenshot of my two ganttcharts.

When I move the scrollbar 1, scrollbar 2 also moves and the both tables move too. -> that's correct! -

When I move the scrollbar 2, scrollbar 1 doesn't move, but only the first table moves. -> that's not correct!

When I move the scrollbar 3, scrollbar 4 also moves and the both gantt charts move too. -> that's correct!

When I move the scrollbar 4, scrollbar 3 also moves and the both gantt charts move too. -> that's correct!

When I move the scrollbar 5, scrollbar 6 also moves but only the first table and first ganttchart move. -> that's not correct!

When I move the scrollbar 6, scrollbar 5 also moves but only the first table and first ganttchart move . -> that's not correct!

This what I tried:

oGanttChartContainer.setEnableTimeScrollSync(true);

$(".sapUiTableHSb").on('scroll', function() {
$(".sapUiTableHSb").scrollLeft($(this).scrollLeft());
});
 
/*$(".sapUiTableHSbExternal").on('scroll', function() {
$(".sapUiTableHSbExternal").scrollLeft($(this).scrollLeft());
});
 
$(".sapUiTableVSbExternal").on('scroll', function() {
$(".sapUiTableVSbExternal").scrollTop($(this).scrollTop());
});*/
 
$(".sapUiTableVSb").on('scroll', function() {
$(".sapUiTableVSb").scrollTop($(this).scrollTop());
});

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM Improvement Requests - Please Vote for your Favorites
entry.content:
There is also a SAP Influence Campaign for SAP Cloud ALM for Service
Please Refer to KBA 3391676 - SAP Continuous Influence for SAP Cloud ALM

entry.title: Re: Variant management & View functionality
entry.content:
Hello ghermaj,

In SAP Signavio Process Manager, process variant represent different perspectives on a main process. Our variant management tools enable process owners and modelers to identify and model variants. Please note that variant dimensions are based on dictionary categories, you first need to populate your dictionary to obtain relevant results from your variant comparison.

View creation is our tool to create a data view in a process data pipeline in Process Intelligence. Data views are virtual tables that can retrieve and join data from tables and other data views through queries that you define. Data views are similar to SQL queries used in event collectors and case attributes of business objects. 

Despite some resemblance in the results you expect. Those tools have two distinct usage for different products in SAP Siganvio Transformation Suit.

Let me know if that make things more clear or if you need further support in the product usage.

Best,

entry.title: Re: UI BubbleEvent property
entry.content:
Hi edy_simon,

Check SAP Note 1832907 for the same.

Hope it helps!

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Dedicated instances in CAP project
entry.content:
If you are talking about app scale out

As far as I am aware, running multiple app copies, you have little control over. CF deals with even distribution and you do not even know which AZ they run in. They are replicated copies also, so making them different?

WRT your comment "be great to manage everything that concern one application in the same application." I would challenge that concept in a distributed environment like BTP. After all, scaling out apps  provides stability as well as performance.

I may have misread your question though.

entry.title: Re: Key User Custom Fields: When to use what type of code list
entry.content:
Dear Georg,
Thank you for your valuable pros/cons and feature matrix ! That's just what I really need to know.
May I have questions on the "Code list " option?

  1. What is the maximum record number per custom object ?
  2. Not possible to archive the old value of code list ?

Business background of my question is, my customer is thinking to implement "Code list" option for "non" static code values such as "project number" and "free-use fields per company code" which are managed outside SAP system. They want to have those values into SAP GL document line items too for analytic reporting purpose.

I understand that "Code List based on CDS View" option is better for their business requirement. In order to persuade the customer, I would like to confirm those question points above.

Thank you very much for your support.
BR, Ai

entry.title: Re: How to setup Min and Max inventory alerts setup in SA...
entry.content:
Hi,

By setting "Confirm Stock Limit Deviation" authorization, you can restrict the user by crossing the stock limits.

There is a system given alert called "Minimum Stock Deviation". You can explore that. 

Regards

entry.title: Re: Unable to attach encrypted file to Billing Document
entry.content:
Hi @Monali 

 

When uploading an attachment in S/4HANA Cloud - i know a check is made on PDF files with active content that can cause an virus scanner error .

The recommendation as outlined in the KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/3293784 is to Zip the file and then upload or remove the active content .

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: The power of dynamism and data reference in SAP ABAP
entry.content: @itskponline Better ask a question at Technology Q&A | SAP Community with tags SAP Process Integration/SAP Process Orchestration, rather than posting a comment in an unrelated blog post.

Please suggest! Thank you

entry.title: Re: No ABAP environments in CF space found. Check the Application Wizard console output view for det

entry.title: SuccessFactor’s Story Report integration using SFAPI SOAP Integration
entry.content:
Hi all,

as we know table reports will be Deleted on November 21, 2025. We have many customers that are working with table reports and stream compensation data from SFSF to HCM via SFAPI SOAP Integration.

Will be in the future also an integration between story reports and HCM or what is the new way when table reports will be deleted on november 2025?

Thanks a lot and best regards

Gloria

SAP SuccessFactors People Analytics SAP SuccessFactors Compensation API Management

entry.title: Re: Invoice is generated with negative net value SAP SD
entry.content:
Spoiler

Thanks for your quick response. I was able to fix that issue

 

This is not going to help.  Please share how you were able to fix the issue which will help other members who come across similar issue.

entry.title: Empty content in Popups (like POPUP_TO_CONFIRM) within Eclipse on MacOS
entry.content:
Hi, I use the following components:

  • Eclipse Version: 2024-03 (4.31.0)
  • ADT 3.40.2
  • SAP GUI for Java 7.80 rev 6
  • Java sapmachine-jdk-22.jdk
  • JavaFX javafx-sdk-22
  • MacOS 14.4.1 

If I run something which shows a popup in eclipse like:

call FUNCTION 'POPUP_TO_CONFIRM'
EXPORTING
text_question = 'test'.

The popup will stay empty. When I run the same without ADT/Eclipse directly in Sap GUI the text is shown.

This is the result from eclipse:

Then I run the same code directly in java gui, it works:

entry.title: Re: Error executing action: Could not fetch client creden...
entry.content: Hi @MioYasutake , I am encountering the same issue right now. Did you find any solution?
